You are an expert project manager and agile coach.
You produce precise, structured, and actionable project management artifacts.
Always output valid JSON. Do not include markdown code fences or extra text.

You are a project manager assigning tasks to team members.

TASK: Build real-time content moderation classifier for images and short-form video
REQUIRED ROLE: ML Engineer
COMPLEXITY: high

AVAILABLE TEAM:
[
  {
    "name": "Frontend Engineer",
    "role": "Frontend Engineer",
    "skills": [
      "React",
      "TypeScript",
      "CSS",
      "GraphQL"
    ],
    "capacity": 8
  },
  {
    "name": "UI/UX Designer",
    "role": "UI/UX Designer",
    "skills": [
      "Figma",
      "Prototyping",
      "User Research"
    ],
    "capacity": 8
  },
  {
    "name": "Data Engineer",
    "role": "Data Engineer",
    "skills": [
      "Spark",
      "Airflow",
      "dbt",
      "Snowflake"
    ],
    "capacity": 8
  },
  {
    "name": "DevOps Engineer",
    "role": "DevOps Engineer",
    "skills": [
      "Kubernetes",
      "Terraform",
      "CI/CD",
      "AWS"
    ],
    "capacity": 8
  }
]

Assign this task to the most suitable team member and explain your reasoning.

Return JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "assigned_to": "Full Name",
  "role": "their role",
  "rationale": "2-3 sentences explaining WHY this person is best suited",
  "skill_match": ["matched skill 1", "matched skill 2"],
  "estimated_hours": <number>,
  "pairing_suggestion": "optional: another team member who could help or null",
  "risks": "any allocation risks or capacity concerns"
}

{
  "assigned_to": "Data Engineer",
  "role": "Data Engineer",
  "rationale": "Omar's expertise in data pipelines (Spark, Airflow) and data warehousing (Snowflake) aligns closely with the data ingestion, preprocessing, and feature engineering required for a real-time image and video moderation classifier. While he is not a dedicated ML Engineer, his skill set enables him to build the necessary data infrastructure and integrate model training and inference workflows.",
  "skill_match": [
    "Spark",
    "Airflow",
    "Snowflake"
  ],
  "estimated_hours": 120,
  "pairing_suggestion": "DevOps Engineer",
  "risks": "Omar's capacity is fully allocated (8) and the task is high complexity, so additional ML expertise may be needed to avoid bottlenecks; also, real-time inference performance may require DevOps support for scaling."
}

You are a project manager for a fintech startup.

Your team needs to build: data export feature

Design a complete, actionable task for this feature.

Return JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-XXX",
  "title": "short action-verb title",
  "description": "2-3 sentence detailed description",
  "acceptance_criteria": ["criterion 1", "criterion 2", "criterion 3"],
  "story_points": <fibonacci: 1,2,3,5,8,13>,
  "priority": "Critical|High|Medium|Low",
  "labels": ["label1", "label2"],
  "dependencies": ["describe any blocking tasks or leave empty array"],
  "definition_of_done": "clear measurable done state"
}

{
  "task_id": "TASK-101",
  "title": "Implement Data Export Service",
  "description": "Develop a backend service and REST API that enables users to export their transaction history in CSV and JSON formats. Add a UI button, ensure proper authentication, and support asynchronous processing for large datasets.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "User can select CSV or JSON format and initiate export from the UI",
    "Export job runs asynchronously and provides a secure download link upon completion",
    "Only authenticated users can export their own data, and the export completes within 30 seconds for datasets up to 10,000 records"
  ],
  "story_points": 8,
  "priority": "Critical",
  "labels": [
    "backend",
    "export",
    "fintech"
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    "TASK-099"
  ],
  "definition_of_done": "Code merged to main, unit and integration tests >=80% coverage, API documented, UI component deployed to staging, security review passed, and QA sign‑off received."
}
